summary:
CircRNAs are not susceptible to degradation by RNase R because their continuous loop lacks free 5′ or 3′ ends required for exo-nuclear digestion. This structural feature makes them highly resistant to enzymes like RNase R, which exclusively degrade linear RNA molecules. 

\boxed{B}
formatted_summary:
agent2 (Round 2 summarized): CircRNAs are not susceptible to degradation by RNase R because their continuous loop lacks free 5′ or 3′ ends required for exo-nuclear digestion. This structural feature makes them highly resistant to enzymes like RNase R, which exclusively degrade linear RNA molecules. 

\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
